name: @checkai/desktop
description: Dedicated Electron desktop app for CheckAI
author: JosunLP <20913954+JosunLP@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:electron
scripts.check: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.start: bun run build && bun x electron .
scripts.pack: bun run build && bun x electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.dist: bun run build && bun x electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
